title: How to send info to Updates section through Zapier

posts.author: JBoese (Janine Boese)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I currently have a gravity form that goes through Zapier and then to Monday.com. Once someone submits a form, I am wanting a certain section of that form to go to the “Updates” section. So, for this instance, it’s a Marketing Request on our website that gets sent to [monday.com]. I’m hoping to have the title of their Marketing Request go under a “Task” and then all the information from that form sent to the “Updates” section. Is that possible?

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JBoese - If I’m understanding correctly, then it’s definitely doable! As long as the form populates information into monday, you can use the columns that it fills as variables to make an update:

image1096×636 35.5 KB

Let me know if this works for you or if you have any questions!
